LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_VCE.description: An industrial liquid storage tank meant for storing chemfuel. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_VCE.label: chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepchemTank.description: A heavy industrial sludge storage tank meant for storing deepchem delivered via deepchem pipe network. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepchemTank.label: deepchem tank
